description: Google Analytics is Google's web and app analytics platform for collecting event data and reporting on user behavior, traffic, and conversions. It includes APIs for administration, reporting, and server-side event ingestion.
summary: Google Analytics exposes three programmatic surfaces for this domain family: the Admin REST API, the Data REST API, and the Measurement Protocol HTTP endpoint; it also publishes an installable local MCP server package (`analytics-mcp`) that uses Google Analytics APIs via Google Application Default Credentials.
